title: News
text: During the 18 to the 20 of March, I participated and presented my work at the DECHEMA : 59 Jahrestreffen Deutscher Katalyker. A big step for my professional career, since it marks the beginning of new openings.

title: Gbocho Alexandre
text:
Applied Mathematician and martial artist.
📍 Berlin, Germany
I am specialized in Mathematical Optimization and Control. I cultivated an interest in interdisciplinary work where advanced Mathematical tools and techniques are required. From Process Engineering, Robotics, Biotechnology (in particular, biofuels and biogazs).
My mission, is to create tools that help engineers and scientist to build better models.
Beside this, I am a martial artist. I have competed in several tournament in Muay Thai. I am currently practicing Karate Kyokushin alongside my work.
▶️ View all repositories

title: Projects
text:
Algorithmic Trajectories Heuristic Emulation of Noise Architecture (ATHENA) is a Mathematical framework generating parametric signals taylored for the needs of Process and Control engineers. My objective was to provide a powerful tool for designing efficient experiments and chemical reactors. From system identification, to integration of design and operation, the signals generated by ATHENA are rich enough to excite all the frequencies of a system in one and multiple dimensions.
This work was introduced for the first time at the 59. Jahrestreffen Deutscher Katalyker (DECHEMA) via a poster under the title : “Design of Excitation Signals based on Metaheuristics”
We will open source this project soon.
Feel free to reach out for future collaborations.
